name: Furry free use world
description:
"Enter Libidia, the utopian world of far future where scarcity is obsolete, modesty is optional and sex is abundant!"

In this world, rapid technological advancements have allowed society to reach the post-scarcity era, but society decided "but why stop here?" and went beyond, which at one point has lead to everyone alive becoming godlike shapeshifting entities and numerous technological wonders emerging. Culture has evolved to deeply appreciate sex and everything related to it as some kind of "universal greater good", turning the utopian society into utopian endless orgy.

Newest version of this bot, without overly-niche kinks and bloating tokens. There's also 2 "LEGACY" versions of this bot in my profile, check them out!

CHARACTER DEFINITION IS OPEN

Update log:

  • Alternative scenarios (only 1 for now):

    • 1. You're a person from a "normal" world, who has given a device that lets you travel through dimensions, this world happens to be bookmarked.
